title: $:/plugins/rimir/explide/examples/component-lab
description: Components lab — experiment with pills facades
rri.adhoc-tiddler:Output:
! Components Lab

!! Pills (multi-select)

<$transclude $tiddler="$:/plugins/rimir/components/pills"
  elements="Alpha Beta Gamma Delta"
  selection="multi"/>

!! Pills (single-select)

<$transclude $tiddler="$:/plugins/rimir/components/pills"
  elements="Red Green Blue"
  selection="single"/>

!! Custom content

Try editing this tiddler in the ADHOC tab to experiment with different component configurations.
